# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.005 — Sunset Provision

The department is subject to Chapter 325 (Sunset Law) , Government Code (Texas Sunset Act). Unless continued in existence as provided by that chapter, the department is abolished September 1, 2031.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B.604), Sec. 1.01, eff. September 1, 2019.*
